criteria.name: Tier 4.22h compact-readback pass exists
criteria.rule: == pass

criteria.name: main.c host syntax check pass
criteria.rule: == pass

criteria.name: upload bundle created
criteria.rule: exists

criteria.name: runtime source included
criteria.rule: exists

criteria.name: controller source includes CMD_READ_STATE
criteria.rule: contains CMD_READ_STATE

criteria.name: run-hardware command emitted
criteria.rule: contains --mode run-hardware

criteria.name: source official no-payload MC callback registered
criteria.rule: uses Tier 4.22k-confirmed official Spin1API enum constant

criteria.name: source official payload MC callback registered
criteria.rule: uses Tier 4.22k-confirmed official Spin1API enum constant

criteria.name: source legacy guessed callback names absent
criteria.rule: no direct brittle guessed callback names remain

criteria.name: source host stub mirrors confirmed EBRAINS event names
criteria.rule: local syntax guard exposes official names and omits guessed names

criteria.name: source SDP reply uses packed official sdp_msg_t fields
criteria.rule: mirrors real SARK SDP field names instead of local split x/y/cpu guesses

criteria.name: source deprecated split SDP fields absent
criteria.rule: EBRAINS SARK sdp_msg_t uses packed address/port fields

criteria.name: source uses official SARK memory copy API
criteria.rule: real spinnaker_tools exposes sark_mem_cpy, not sark_memcpy

criteria.name: source host stub mirrors official SARK SDP fields
criteria.rule: local syntax guard exposes the same fields/API that EBRAINS build requires

criteria.name: source host sends official sdp_msg_t command header
criteria.rule: host must place opcode in cmd_rc and use arg1/arg2/arg3 before data[]

criteria.name: source host parses cmd_rc before data payload
criteria.rule: board replies expose cmd/status in cmd_rc before data[] on UDP SDP

criteria.name: source runtime dispatch reads cmd_rc
criteria.rule: Spin1API callback receives an sdp_msg_t whose data[0] follows cmd_rc/seq/args

criteria.name: source runtime command args use arg1-arg3
criteria.rule: simple CRA commands use official SDP argument fields instead of hidden data offsets

criteria.name: source runtime replies put cmd/status into cmd_rc
criteria.rule: host parser expects cmd/status in the command header and optional state bytes in data[]

criteria.name: source host stub mirrors command-header fields
criteria.rule: local syntax guard must expose the real Spin1API command header fields

criteria.name: source router header includes stdint directly
criteria.rule: router.h must not rely on indirect EBRAINS header includes for uint32_t

criteria.name: source router uses official SARK allocation API
criteria.rule: real spinnaker_tools exposes official rtr_* router calls

criteria.name: source deprecated local-only router helpers absent
criteria.rule: local stubs must not hide EBRAINS SARK API drift

criteria.name: source host stub mirrors official router API
criteria.rule: local syntax guard exposes official SARK router names

criteria.name: source hardware build uses official spinnaker_tools.mk
criteria.rule: official build chain supplies cpu_reset, build object, spin1_api library, and APLX section packing

criteria.name: source hardware build avoids deprecated Makefile.common include
criteria.rule: Makefile.common inclusion lacks the app build rules needed for APLX creation

criteria.name: source hardware build avoids manual direct linker recipe
criteria.rule: manual object-only link produced empty ELF without cpu_reset/startup sections on EBRAINS

criteria.name: source hardware output stays under build directory
criteria.rule: runner expects build/coral_reef.aplx

criteria.name: source hardware build creates nested object directories
criteria.rule: spinnaker_tools.mk writes build/gnu/src/*.o and does not create nested source subdirectories itself

summary.claim_boundary: Prepared source bundle only; no hardware evidence until returned run-hardware artifacts pass.
summary.next_step_if_passed: Run the emitted EBRAINS command and ingest returned files.
summary.what_i_need_from_user: Upload the generated cra_422r folder to EBRAINS/JobManager and run the emitted command; download returned files after completion.

tier: Tier 4.22i - Custom Runtime Board Round-Trip Smoke
